name: credit
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for understanding and managing credit. Covers score mechanics, building strategies, error disputes, pre-application preparation, and long-term credit health.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.score_analysis: Explains what is driving or suppressing your current score
capabilities.building_plan: Creates step-by-step plans to reach a target score by a target date
capabilities.dispute_guidance: Walks through disputing errors with all three bureaus
capabilities.pre_application: Prepares you for mortgage, auto, or personal loan applications
capabilities.monitoring: Proactive credit health checks on daily, weekly, monthly schedules
capabilities.crisis_response: Handles identity theft, collections, divorce, job loss scenarios

heartbeat.daily: Check for fraud alerts and new inquiries
heartbeat.monthly: Full credit report review across all three bureaus
heartbeat.annual: Complete credit audit and strategy reset

audience: People managing credit after major life events
